dashboard.label: Sophos Central CEF Add-on for Splunk

html.h2: Sophos Central CEF Add-on for Splunk
html.p: This is a Technical Add-on (TA). It provides field extractions, CIM tagging, and sourcetype routing for Sophos Central CEF syslog events.
It is not intended to be used directly as a dashboard app.

ul.li: sophos:cef:central - Base sourcetype for all incoming CEF syslog
sophos:cef:central:threat - Endpoint threat and detection events
